creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad The craziest, trippy museum has just opened in London and it will leave you questioning reality 🤨🌀

This is the brand new @museumofillusions_london on Tottenham Court Road, with 60+ mind-bending exhibits, from illusion rooms to the perfect installations for the trippiest photos, there’s something here for everyone that will leave you questioning what’s real. Each exhibit has a simple explanation to help you understand the science behind the trick too!

Share this with someone who would love to go!
📍 Museum of Illusions, 6, 17 Tottenham Ct Rd, London W1T 1BJ
🎟️ Adult tickets from £23.20, children from £19.20, children 4 and under go free! Student discount and Blue Light Card holder discount available too!
⏳ 1-2 hours to go around
👥 All ages welcome

geo_locations: Museum of Illusions, 6, 17 Tottenham Ct Rd, London W1T 1BJ
pinned_places: Museum of Illusions, 6, 17 Tottenham Ct Rd, London W1T 1BJ

transcription.text: The craziest, most trippy museum has just opened in London and it will challenge your senses and leave you questioning what's real and what's a complete illusion. Say hello to the Museum of Illusions on Tottenham Court Road with over 60 mind bending exhibits. You'll walk into infinity rooms and forget where the exit is, you'll defy gravity, turn yourself into a ghost and even clone yourself. There are so many illusion rooms, installations and optical illusions. And it is honestly so much fun and there are of course some incredible photo opportunities. It's a really hands on experience and perfect for all ages and each illusion comes with a simple explanation so you can learn about the science behind each trick. It's definitely a really fun one to check out, find all the details in the caption.
